name: How long do I have to file a claim in Utah if I'm too hurt to work?
description: In Utah, you generally have one year to notify your employer of the injury and six years to file a formal claim. However, immediate reporting is essential to se

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a claim in Utah if I'm too hurt to work?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Utah, you generally have one year to notify your employer of the injury and six years to file a formal claim. However, immediate reporting is essential to secure wage replacement benefits without delay.
